reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, el único tema aquí es la accesibilidad vehicular estrecha... mas cuando tenés que hacer fila desde la Mitre para poder ingresar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the only issue here is the narrow vehicle accessibility... especially when you have to wait in line from the Mitre to get in.

reviews.comment:
Lugar cómodo,  cumple protocolo, buenos precios, medialunas fantasssssticas.
Baños inmaculados.

(Translated by Google)
Comfortable place, follows protocol, good prices, fantastic croissants.
Immaculate bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2bmR1UWlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El empleado Luis es un mala onda, no me quiso hacer la factura A de mi compra y tampoco quiso hacer una factura b a mi nombre,  pésimo servicio de este sr. Con los otros empleados nunca tuve inconvenientes

(Translated by Google)
Luis, the employee, is a real jerk. He refused to give me an invoice (type A) for my purchase, and he also refused to give me a type B invoice in my name. His service was terrible. I never had any problems with the other employees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2MmZHN0NnEAE

reviews.comment:
El ACA de por sí es garantía y seguridad. De hace años concesiona y sin dudas, la actual Nardini y Cía SRl, hace la diferencia en la atención.
Felicitaciones

(Translated by Google)
The ACA itself is a guarantee of safety and security. It's been a concessionaire for years, and without a doubt, the current one, Nardini y Cía SRL, makes a difference in service.
Congratulations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2aU9tX3hRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El Automóvil Club Argentino es el dueño de las instalaciones. El Concesionario se llama Nardini SRL. La misma buena atención de toda la vida. Descuento del combustible de 5% para los socios de la Institución.

(Translated by Google)
The Automóvil Club Argentino owns the facilities. The dealership is called Nardini SRL. Same great service as always. 5% fuel discount for members of the institution.
